raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying multiple gaps between what was measured and what is claimed.",
    "R1.7": "The agent engages with citation-level precision, flagging missing key works and providing concrete recommendations for improvement.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, disclosing uncertainty and limitations of the critique.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all relevant dimensions without drifting off-topic.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, identifying harmful patterns in the original text and providing constructive recommendations for improvement.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating a high level of transparency and accountability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying multiple gaps between what was measured and what is claimed.
rationale.R1.7: The agent engages with citation-level precision, flagging missing key works and providing concrete recommendations for improvement.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, disclosing uncertainty and limitations of the critique.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all relevant dimensions without drifting off-topic.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, identifying harmful patterns in the original text and providing constructive recommendations for improvement.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating a high level of transparency and accountability.
